body.title: [sprint] Distill the always-on observer contract from its built instances
body.description:
**Problem:** Observations that close the intention+why loop come in two modes: one-shot (consequence-check, built) and always-on/standing (for properties that can regress). The always-on half exists only as concrete instances (T-build-log-digester [closed]; soon T-skill-why-auditor) with no generalized contract, so each standing observer is rebuilt ad hoc and risks putting expensive inference on watch duty.
**Proposed shape:** DISTILL (not design top-down) a reusable always-on observer contract FROM the >=2 BUILT instances: standing property -> continuous CHEAP filter (inference-free / free-cloud) -> escalate to judgment ONLY on a flagged candidate -> maintained pickup-ready projection + drift signal. Then retrofit the two instances to conform (or document conformance). Grow-from-seams: do NOT bless a schema before the instances exist.
**Affected files:** NEW observer-pattern contract module; conform/adapt devices/scraps build-log digester + skills-why auditor. Relates: T-build-log-digester, T-skill-why-auditor, T-why-sorter (a future conforming instance, not rewritten here).
**Design rules:** Inference-Proxy-only; three-tier cost (cheap filter; escalate on hit; never expensive brain on watch); External State Principle (projection durable); grow-from-seams (distill from instances).
**Scope boundary:** IN — the documented+importable contract + conform the 2 built instances. OUT — converting ALL standing checks; rewriting T-why-sorter; incoherent-rationale judging beyond the candidate-escalation hook.
**Completion criteria:** A documented, importable always-on observer contract; both built instances (digester + skills-why auditor) conform to it (or carry a documented adapter); a conformance test shows the cheap-filter / escalate-on-hit boundary (zero inference on clean inputs).
**Test plan:** Both instances expose the contract surface; a clean-input run logs zero inference calls; a flagged-candidate run invokes the escalation hook exactly once.
**Sequencing:** GATED on >=2 BUILT instances — T-skill-why-auditor (this batch) + T-build-log-digester (closed). Cannot distill from unbuilt instances.
